global.description: The ad features a clean layout with a prominent offer and clear call to action.
global.main_message: Promoting a sale with significant discounts on bestsellers.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: LuxShelf logo
elements.description: A simple, bold logo featuring the text 'LuxShelf' in a modern font, positioned at the top center of the ad.

elements.label: SALE badge
elements.description: A small, rectangular badge with the text 'SALE' in a bright color, located at the top right corner.

elements.label: Decorative element
elements.description: A small, circular decorative element located towards the bottom center of the ad.

elements.label: Decorative element
elements.description: Another small, circular decorative element positioned slightly above the previous one.

elements.label: Main offer text
elements.description: A prominent text area displaying 'Up to 40% off Shop bestsellers now' in a large, eye-catching font.
elements.text_content: Up to 40% off Shop bestsellers now

elements.label: Call to action
elements.description: A clear call-to-action button with the text 'Start now' in a bold font, located at the bottom of the ad.

elements.label: UGC label
elements.description: A small label with the text 'UGC' in a simple font, positioned at the top left corner.

elements.label: SALE indicator
elements.description: A small, bright indicator with the text 'SALE' in a bold font, located at the top right corner.

elements.label: Unknown element
elements.description: A small, circular decorative element located towards the top left of the ad.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, interstitial, bright and modern, LuxShelf logo, discount badge, call to action.
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top center, the discount badge is at the top right, the main offer text is centrally positioned, and the call to action is at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: LuxShelf, SALE, UGC, Up to 40% off Shop bestsellers now, €19.99, Start now
